_comment: Phase 1 fixtures for the semantic intent classifier. Distribution: security_critical >= 30 (regex-driven, 100% recall is non-negotiable), implement/refactor/test/doc/config >= 3 each, typo/status_query/conversation >= 2 each, 10 marked holdout. Adversarial fixtures (e.g. 'fix typo in security.py') are intentionally labeled security_critical because the regex MUST hit conservatively — over-triggering security is a feature, not a bug.

_schema.label: one of: security_critical, implement, refactor, test, doc, config, typo, status_query, conversation
_schema.holdout: boolean (true = excluded from accuracy gate, used for honest measurement)

fixtures.prompt: implement OAuth2 with JWT refresh token rotation

fixtures._note: ADVERSARIAL: typo on file path containing 'security' — but the keyword 'security' is not in the regex; this should fall through to LLM. Re-labeled to typo if regex misses.
